category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Zimbabwe market (SAZ conformity adopting ZWS/EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, NSSA occupational-safety framework, importer obligations).

title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入津巴布韦（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入辛巴威（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Zimbabwe market requirements administered by the Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ), which sets and adopts ZWS standards (commonly aligned with EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the National Social Security Authority (NSSA) occupational-safety framework, import conformity inspection, and the national health regulator route for medical masks. Zimbabwe is landlocked; goods commonly route via Durban or Beira.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与津巴布韦市场要求对照。该市场由津巴布韦标准协会（SAZ）管理，SAZ制定并采纳ZWS标准（通常与EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3一致），并涉及国家社会保障局（NSSA）职业安全框架、进口符合性检验，以及医用口罩经由国家卫生监管机构的路径。津巴布韦为内陆国，货物通常经德班或贝拉港转运。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與辛巴威市場要求對照。該市場由辛巴威標準協會（SAZ）管理，SAZ制定並採納ZWS標準（通常與EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3一致），並涉及國家社會保障局（NSSA）職業安全框架、進口符合性檢驗，以及醫用口罩經由國家衛生監管機構的路徑。辛巴威為內陸國，貨物通常經德班或貝拉港轉運。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Zimbabwe law, SAZ-adopted ZWS standards, NSSA occupational-safety obligations, import inspection practice, and the national health regulator route for medical masks with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行津巴布韦法律、SAZ采纳的ZWS标准、NSSA职业安全义务、进口检验实践及医用口罩经国家卫生监管机构的路径。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行辛巴威法律、SAZ採納的ZWS標準、NSSA職業安全義務、進口檢驗實踐及醫用口罩經國家衛生監管機構的路徑。

answer_first.en: FFP filtering respirators entering Zimbabwe are assessed against SAZ-administered conformity using ZWS standards that commonly adopt EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), within the NSSA occupational-safety framework, with importer obligations and import conformity inspection. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not automatically satisfy the SAZ/ZWS-adopted EN 149 route. Medical masks follow the national health regulator route, not the occupational-PPE route. Zimbabwe is landlocked, so shipments typically transit Durban or Beira.
answer_first.zh: 进入津巴布韦的FFP过滤式呼吸器须依据SAZ管理的符合性评定，采用通常采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的ZWS标准，并处于NSSA职业安全框架内，伴随进口商义务及进口符合性检验。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不会自动满足SAZ/ZWS采纳的EN 149路径。医用口罩遵循国家卫生监管机构路径，而非职业PPE路径。津巴布韦为内陆国，货物通常经德班或贝拉港转运。
answer_first.zht: 進入辛巴威的FFP過濾式呼吸器須依據SAZ管理的符合性評定，採用通常採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的ZWS標準，並處於NSSA職業安全框架內，伴隨進口商義務及進口符合性檢驗。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不會自動滿足SAZ/ZWS採納的EN 149路徑。醫用口罩遵循國家衛生監管機構路徑，而非職業PPE路徑。辛巴威為內陸國，貨物通常經德班或貝拉港轉運。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows are AI-generated drafts pending named-reviewer verification before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official SAZ, NSSA, and Zimbabwe government primary sources are preferred.
